rationale: The citing paper’s note explicitly says it “extends prior work … focused on business-cycle variation,” and the cited paper is precisely a business-cycle study of brand-level price and advertising effectiveness (short- and long-run elasticities). Both papers share highly overlapping setting and constructs (U.K. CPG brands, advertising/price elasticities over demand-cycle conditions), making this likely a substantive theoretical/empirical antecedent rather than a generic mention.
